title: alchemilla alpina var. vaccariana
intro: Alchemilla alpina var. vaccariana, also known as Vaccarian alpine lady's mantle, is a plant species within the genus Alchemilla. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing irritated skin, reducing swelling, and relieving menstrual cramps due to its anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla alpina var. vaccariana, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
